claims.claim: Kuramoto model exhibits a phase transition from disordered (R ~ 0) to synchronized (R ~ 0.97) states as coupling K increases.
allowed_language: order parameter R increases with K
R rises from approximately 0.08 to approximately 0.98
transition observed across K range 0 to 6
known_limitations: Only N=128 for R vs K verification
Only all-to-all topology tested
K range 0-6 may not capture full transition
Single frequency distribution (Gaussian)
ontological_prohibitions: DO NOT claim this demonstrates consciousness
DO NOT claim this proves idealism
DO NOT claim this confirms sentience or experience
DO NOT claim this validates any metaphysical framework
DO NOT use 'proof of mind' or 'consciousness confirmed' language
exploratory_allowed: recursive persistence may be possible under these conditions

claims.claim: The transition is continuous (second-order), with negligible hysteresis between forward and backward coupling sweeps.
allowed_language: forward and backward sweeps produce nearly overlapping curves
transition is continuous to the resolution of our measurements
no discontinuous jump in order parameter
known_limitations: Only N=64 tested
Backward sweep initialized from forward end-state (not independent)
4-trial average; no single-trial loop area variance reported
Threshold of 0.15 is arbitrary with no theoretical basis
ontological_prohibitions: DO NOT claim this demonstrates consciousness
DO NOT claim this proves idealism
DO NOT claim this confirms sentience or experience
DO NOT claim this validates any metaphysical framework
DO NOT use 'proof of mind' or 'consciousness confirmed' language
exploratory_allowed: recursive persistence may be possible under these conditions

claims.claim: Finite-size sharpening is observed: the transition region narrows as N increases from 16 to 128.
allowed_language: transition region sharpens with increasing N
finite-size effects visible across N values
consistent with continuous phase transition finite-size scaling
known_limitations: Only N = 16, 32, 64, 128 tested
No N > 128 tested
Finite-size scaling form not independently verified
ontological_prohibitions: DO NOT claim this demonstrates consciousness
DO NOT claim this proves idealism
DO NOT claim this confirms sentience or experience
DO NOT claim this validates any metaphysical framework
DO NOT use 'proof of mind' or 'consciousness confirmed' language
exploratory_allowed: recursive persistence may be possible under these conditions

claims.claim: Critical slowing is observed: relaxation time increases near the critical coupling.
allowed_language: relaxation time increases approximately 6-fold near critical region
relaxation time peaks at K approximately 1.4
forbidden_language: critical slowing confirmed with rigorous tau measurement
relaxation time exactly characterizes critical dynamics
known_limitations: Only N=64 tested
tau defined via 90% threshold, not autocorrelation time
4 trials insufficient for robust tau estimation
K_peak=1.42 slightly higher than other estimator Kc values
ontological_prohibitions: DO NOT claim this demonstrates consciousness
DO NOT claim this proves idealism
DO NOT claim this confirms sentience or experience
DO NOT claim this validates any metaphysical framework
DO NOT use 'proof of mind' or 'consciousness confirmed' language
exploratory_allowed: recursive persistence may be possible under these conditions

claims.claim: The critical behavior is robust across topology (all-to-all and Erdős-Rényi) and frequency distribution (Gaussian and Uniform).
allowed_language: transition confirmed in all tested conditions
not an artifact of all-to-all connectivity alone
forbidden_language: all-to-all is representative of arbitrary networks
known_limitations: Only p=0.25 for ER topology
Only Gaussian and Uniform frequencies tested
Only 4 conditions total tested
Scale-free and small-world not in Phase 253

forbidden_language: Binder minimum deepens systematically with N
Binder minimum gives precise Kc estimate
known_limitations: Binder minimum depth is parameter-sensitive
Conflicting data between Phase 252 scripts and Phase 256 replication

No standardized protocol for Binder measurement

scaling law verified with high confidence

claims.claim: Critical coupling Kc is approximately 1.4 across estimators, with uncertainty of approximately 0.5.
allowed_language: Kc approximately 1.4 from chi, Binder, and tau estimators
finite-size effects and estimator choice introduce uncertainty
Kc in approximate range 1.3 to 1.8 across measurements

tau estimator saturated at max in Phase 256
K estimates shift with N (N=16: K=0.4-1.78, N=64: K=0.86-1.32)
1/N extrapolation gave unreliable Kc estimates (negative values)

global_ontological_constraints.description: All claims C1-C10 are empirically grounded and MUST NOT be elevated to ontological status. The following constraints apply to all claims and all manuscript sections.

project_a_empirical.focus: synchronization geometry, scaling behavior, critical dynamics

project_b_ontological.focus: experiential persistence, recursive stability, fertility, emergent selfhood

global_ontological_constraints.separation_principle: The empirical chain (Project A) constrains ontology (Project B). Ontology does NOT constrain the empirical chain. No philosophical consideration may influence parameter selection, estimator definition, threshold setting, or claim classification.
